name: Can I file a class action against Google if their AI Overview screwed over my Chicago business with wrong legal info?
description: Unlikely class action success; pursue individual claims against your lawyer instead.[7]

mainEntity.name: Can I file a class action against Google if their AI Overview screwed over my Chicago business with wrong legal info?

acceptedAnswer.text: Unlikely class action success; pursue individual claims against your lawyer instead.[7]
acceptedAnswer.description: Class actions against Google for AI Overviews are unlikely to succeed due to terms of service disclaimers and lack of precedent for general negligence claims, unlike copyright cases.[7] Heppner and similar rulings highlight AI risks but focus on user responsibility for verification, not platform liability.[1] Factors: prove widespread harm, reliance, and Google's direct fault beyond warnings. Individual malpractice suits against your own lawyers may be stronger. Review Google's TOS; consider small claims for direct losses first. Outcomes favor users verifying AI outputs.
